traits.name: Maudet
traits.description: When you level up, you gain 2 extra Attribute Points to spend on top of the 15 you already receive.

traits.name: Diplomat
traits.description: Once per faction, when interacting with a faction you have a connection to, you can choose to roll a Charisma check to see if you have a useful connection within that faction.

variants.name: Alder
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in Nature or expertise if you already have it.

variants.name: Greymarch
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in one Charisma skill of your choice.

variants.name: Salt
variants.bonus: Gain a swim speed equal to your walking speed.

name: Canor
title: Fiercely Loyal Servants
languages: One common language of your choice

traits.name: Loyalty
traits.description: Whenever you would deal damage to a creature you designate as an ally, the damage is halved. The effect also applies if an ally damages you.

traits.name: Blind Servitude
traits.description: After a long rest, you can emotionally bond yourself to another intelligent creature. While bonded, both of you gain combat and social benefits around each other, but if you are separated for more than a week, you take psychic damage every hour until reunited.

variants.name: Lion
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in Intimidation or expertise if you already have it.

name: Capra
title: Keepers of Knowledge
languages: One common or rare language of your choice

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have darkvision of 60ft.

traits.name: Mark of Ku
traits.description: Once per long rest, as an action, for the next minute all allies within 40ft of you begin to regain 2d6 hit points at the start of each of your turns.

traits.name: Mark of Nemit
traits.description: Once per long rest, as an action, for the next minute all allies within 40ft of you regain 2d8 hit points when they consume food, potions, or similar items, and effect durations from the consumable are doubled.

traits.name: Mark of Jurik
traits.description: Once per long rest, as an action, for the next minute all allies within 40ft of you gain advantage on all saving throws.

traits.name: Divine Champion
traits.description: You gain advantage on History and Religion checks. As an action, you can use your Cleric's Divine Intervention ability using total level in place of Cleric level. Once used, it cannot be used again for 1d4 + 2 days.

variants.name: Ku
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in Medicine or expertise if you already have it.

variants.name: Nemit
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in Survival or expertise if you already have it.

variants.name: Jurik
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in History or expertise if you already have it.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior darkvision of 120ft. You can see in darkness within 60ft as if it were bright light and another 60ft as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Seaborne
traits.description: Any ship you personally maintain or work on for at least an hour gains additional hit points equal to your level times 5. Any ship you helm gains an additional 20ft of movement speed.

traits.name: Silver-Tongued
traits.description: Whenever making a Charisma skill check to discuss or haggle prices, you gain advantage on the roll.

traits.name: Banned
traits.description: Whenever you participate in gambling, you tend to be luckier than your opponents.

variants.name: Otter
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in Stealth or expertise if you already have it.

variants.name: Badger
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have darkvision of 60ft.

traits.name: Majestic Wings
traits.description: You gain a 30ft flying speed while your wings are unfolded. Intelligent creatures who see your wings can be charmed by you for 1d4 rounds unless they succeed on a Wisdom saving throw.

traits.name: Mothwing Dust
traits.description: Once per long rest, the first creature to hit you with an attack while within 5ft becomes coated in dust. For the rest of combat, you can sense that creature's location while within 80ft.

traits.name: Intense Emotions
traits.description: As an action, you can target a creature within 40ft and force them to feel the same emotion you feel for the next hour.

variants.name: Adept
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in a skill of your choice.

variants.name: Messenger
variants.bonus: Increase either your walking speed or your flying speed by 5ft.

traits.name: Teachings of the Edenkite
traits.description: When you take a short rest, choose either yourself or another creature resting with you to fully restore either hunger, sanity, or hit points for that creature.

traits.name: Combat Mercy
traits.description: As an action in combat, you can attempt to calm and subdue a creature's aggressive state with a special strike and Willpower save.

variants.name: Slate
variants.bonus: Gain resistance to one physical damage type of your choice.

traits.name: Molt
traits.description: You gain resistance to poisons, and natural effects on you such as those from potions have their duration cut in half.

traits.name: Fanged
traits.description: As an action, you can make an unarmed attack with your fangs against a creature within 5ft, dealing 2d4 poison damage and applying the last effect applied to you even if it was resisted.

traits.name: Slit Tongue
traits.description: Gain expertise in Deception.

variants.name: Coral
variants.bonus: Double your carrying capacity or gain a swimming speed equal to your movement speed.

name: Felinor
title: Carefree Outlaws
languages: One common language of your choice

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior darkvision of 120ft.

traits.name: Nightchild
traits.description: You gain advantage on stealth checks and a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

traits.name: Untothered
traits.description: You gain resistance to psychic damage.

traits.name: Daughter of Freedom
traits.description: Once per long rest, as a reaction, you can take any action or bonus action you want.

variants.name: Panther
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in Stealth or expertise if you already have it.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have superior darkvision of 120ft.

traits.name: Deepfolk
traits.description: Your sanity tier changes how your mind works and what bonuses or penalties you receive.

traits.name: Glass Mind
traits.description: Whenever you fall to 0 sanity, you can instead bring yourself back to full sanity at the cost of permanently losing one emotion.

traits.name: Thick Shell
traits.description: You gain a permanent +1 to AC.

variants.name: Titan
variants.bonus: Gain +10 to either Strength or Fortitude.

traits.name: Navae's Blessing
traits.description: Your maximum Hunger increases by 5 and your maximum Ether increases by 15.

traits.name: Navae's Guidance
traits.description: You gain proficiency in Animal Handling, Nature, and Survival, and may choose one of these to gain expertise in.

traits.name: Bestial Bond
traits.description: You can bond with a friendly beast over the course of a short rest.

traits.name: Wild Wilderness
traits.description: You gain both a climbing speed and a swimming speed equal to your movement speed. You are immune to difficult terrain.

traits.name: Oils and Boils
traits.description: When crafting cooking, poisons, or potions, a high roll can create a second version at no extra cost.

variants.name: Birch
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in Intimidation or expertise if you already have it.

variants.name: Redwood
variants.bonus: Your size becomes Large and your base movement speed increases to 35ft.

variants.name: Aspen
variants.bonus: Gain advantage on all Animal Handling skills that deal with sea creatures or sea monsters.

variants.name: Teak
variants.bonus: Every long rest, a fruit providing 1 food portion falls off your antlers.

traits.name: Soaring Phoenix
traits.description: You gain a flying speed of 40ft. When you return to the ground after flying, you can create a fiery explosion in a 10ft radius that deals fire or cold damage depending on your variant.

variants.name: Alphelion
variants.bonus: Your Heliodar abilities deal cold damage instead of fire. Gain resistance to cold damage.

name: Khan
title: Prideful Warriors
languages: One common language of your choice

traits.name: Versatile
traits.description: You can fully utilize items with stat requirements 5 points lower than normal.

traits.name: Brachiate
traits.description: You gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed, can jump double your regular distance, and are not imposed disadvantage on stealth checks when wearing armor that would do so.

traits.name: Built for War
traits.description: Add a d4 to attack rolls and damage rolls. The die increases by one every round after the first in combat, to a maximum of a d12.

traits.name: Echolocator
traits.description: You gain blindsight up to 60ft, allowing you to sense shapes and formations around you and detect hidden or invisible creatures within that range. You cannot see beyond this range and cannot be surprised.

traits.name: Unnatural Essence
traits.description: Your bloodline is permanently altered by strange arcane effects. Roll on the Wild Magic table to determine the effect.

variants.name: Kerivoula
variants.bonus: Critical hits cause the Blinded condition for 1d4 rounds.

variants.name: Hypsignathus
variants.bonus: -5 sanity loss whenever your sanity would drop.

variants.name: Megaderma
variants.bonus: Gain an extra arm that can wield and interact with items and weapons.

variants.name: Lasiurus
variants.bonus: Melee attacks against you inflict the Burning condition on the attacker for one round.

name: Levit
title: Rabbits...?
languages: One common or rare language of your choice

traits.name: Retrograde
traits.description: Once per short rest, at the end of your turn, you can use a reaction to jump back in time to the start of your turn.

traits.name: Existence
traits.description: After any interaction with an intelligent creature, there is a 50% chance the creature will forget you.

traits.name: Page Skipper
traits.description: Five times per campaign, you can ask one 'what if' question to the DM.

traits.name: Turtle and the Hare
traits.description: Every long rest, roll a d20. On a 20, a dangerous and lethal event will kill you that following day. If you avoid it, the number needed drops by one permanently.

variants.name: Silver
variants.bonus: Gain proficiency in Stealth or expertise if you already have it.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have darkvision of 60ft.

traits.name: Mind of Madness
traits.description: All Lightborn start at 50% corruption. Corruption rises or falls depending on your actions and grants different effects at different stages.

variants.name: Alpha
variants.bonus: All physical damage you deal is converted into radiant (necrotic) damage. Gain +1 to weapon attack rolls.

variants.name: Beta
variants.bonus: All mantra damage you deal is converted into radiant (necrotic) damage. Gain +1 to spell attack rolls.

variants.name: Delta
variants.bonus: All physical damage taken is converted to radiant (necrotic) damage. Gain +10 to Fortitude.

traits.name: Feathered Glider
traits.description: All Tiran start with a magical glider item that can be upgraded over time.

traits.name: Mystical Mind
traits.description: Every long rest, you can choose any skill except Charisma skills to receive either proficiency or expertise if you already have proficiency. You must also choose a Charisma skill that receives a -5 penalty.

variants.name: Canary
variants.bonus: -5 sanity loss whenever your sanity would drop.

variants.name: Crow
variants.bonus: Gain +10 to either Willpower or Intelligence.

traits.name: Chitin
traits.description: Every long rest you gain temporary hit points equal to a quarter of your maximum health, rounded up. While these temporary hit points are active, you gain resistance to all physical damage.

traits.name: Bug-Brained
traits.description: You gain disadvantage on all Charisma checks against non-Hivekins but gain advantage on Charisma checks against Hivekin.

traits.name: Greative Syndicate
traits.description: As an action, you can release special pheromones to call a squad of sentinels from the nearest Greathive.

variants.name: Plackart
variants.bonus: Choose one damage type to gain resistance to while your temporary hit points from Chitin are active.

variants.name: Besague
variants.bonus: Gain +10 to your class's spellcasting ability.

variants.name: Sabaton
variants.bonus: Four Vesperian Sentinels are called instead of three when using your Greative Syndicate ability.
